name: Live activity pill updates as customers interact
description: User leaves the dashboard tab open while a customer opens an emailed quote. The 'Live activity' pill in the topbar should update from 'All quiet' to a fresh event without a hard refresh.

persona.name: Lena Park
persona.context: Sent a $4,800 interior paint quote to the Browning family this morning. Keeps the dashboard open in a pinned tab.

preconditions: A quote has been sent to a customer in the last hour
Dashboard tab has been open for >30 seconds

steps.action: Has /dashboard open in a background tab
steps.expect: Live activity pill reads 'All quiet — nothing new'

steps.action: Opens the quote email and clicks the link

steps.expect: Pill updates to 'Browning opened your quote' within ~10s without page reload
Opens an activity feed (drawer or page) showing the open with timestamp

evaluationCriteria.check: Pill animates subtly when content changes (not a jarring layout shift)
Update arrives close to real time — feels alive, not stale
Activity feed is sorted newest-first and de-duplicates rapid repeat opens
Update is announced via aria-live=polite so screen reader users notice it
